name: tesseract
description: Claude Code plugins for infrastructure review, sprint planning, and development workflows

plugins.name: infra-review
plugins.description: Infrastructure review agents for Terraform/Atmos repositories — security, architecture, operations, cost optimization, AWS Well-Architected Framework reviews, and terraform plan analysis

plugins.name: clickup-sprint-planner
plugins.description: Sprint planning tools for ClickUp — bulk task operations, relationship field management, plan-doc-to-ClickUp sync, and action logging

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: General-purpose development workflow skills — structured research with citations and TDD-based feature implementation with progress tracking
